// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
import scala.scalanative.libc.errno.errno
import scala.scalanative.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativePtr, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class HandleBindingsImpl extends HandleBindings:
    import `HandleBindings$externs` as ext

    def open(path: String)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Handle[kyo.example.golden.MyHandle] =
        Zone.acquire { implicit z =>
            val pathC = toCString(path)
            val retVal = ext.open(pathC)
            if retVal == null then throw new kyo.ffi.FfiNullPointer("kyo.example.HandleBindings.open returned null") else Ffi.Handle.wrap(new NativePtr(retVal))
        }

    def close(h: Ffi.Handle[kyo.example.golden.MyHandle])(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Unit =
        val hPtr = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[NativePtr](Ffi.Handle.unwrap(h).asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[NativePtr], "NativePtr on Native", "kyo.example.HandleBindings", "close").ptr
        ext.close(hPtr)
        ()
end HandleBindingsImpl

object HandleBindingsImpl:
    import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.HandleBindings")
end HandleBindingsImpl

@extern
@link("kyo_handle")
private[example] object `HandleBindings$externs`:
    def open(path: CString): Ptr[Byte] = extern
    def close(h: Ptr[Byte]): Unit = extern
end `HandleBindings$externs`
